Container.Name: sons-of-the-forest-modded
Container.Overview:
Sons of the Forest Dedicated Server with RedLoader mod support.
Based on Debian 13 (Trixie) with GE-Proton. RedLoader enables mod loading via Thunderstore mods.
**Data layout (all under /data):** - /data/server/ — game server files + Mods/ directory - /data/config/ — server config (dedicatedserver.cfg, ownerswhitelist.txt) - /data/saves/ — world save slots - /data/logs/ — server.log - /data/backups/ — automated daily backups
**Mod setup:** 1. Start container — game + RedLoader download automatically 2. Stop container when RedLoader installation is confirmed in logs 3. Drop mods into /data/server/Mods/ (from https://thunderstore.io/c/sons_of_the_forest/) 4. Restart

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores server files (/server), saves (/saves), config (/config), logs (/logs), and backups (/backups).

Config.Name: Server Name
Config.Description: Display name shown in the server browser.

Config.Name: Server Password
Config.Description: Leave empty for a public server.

Config.Name: Max Players
Config.Description: Maximum concurrent players (1-8).

Config.Name: Game Mode
Config.Description: Game difficulty: Normal, Hard, HardSurvival, Peaceful, Creative, or Custom.

Config.Name: Save Slot
Config.Description: Save slot number (1-5).

Config.Name: Owner Steam IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated 64-bit SteamIDs of server owners/admins.

Config.Name: Install RedLoader
Config.Description: Download and install RedLoader mod loader on startup (true/false).

Config.Name: RedLoader Version
Config.Description: RedLoader version to install. Use 'latest' or specify a tag like v0.8.6.

Config.Name: Save Mode
Config.Description: Save behaviour: Continue (resume last save) or CoopSurvival.

Config.Name: Save Interval
Config.Description: Auto-save interval in seconds.

Config.Name: LAN Only
Config.Description: Restrict server to LAN only (true/false).

Config.Name: Verbose Logging
Config.Description: Enable -verboseLogging for detailed output (true/false). Generates large logs.

Config.Name: Game Port
Config.Description: Primary game port (must match port mapping below).

Config.Name: Query Port
Config.Description: Steam query port (must match port mapping below).

Config.Name: BlobSync Port
Config.Description: BlobSync port (must match port mapping below).

Config.Name: Validate Files
Config.Description: Re-validate game files on each start (true/false).

Config.Name: Backup Retention
Config.Description: Days to keep automated backups.

Config.Name: Game Config
Config.Description: Game preset selector. Do not change.

Config.Name: Steam App ID
Config.Description: SotF Dedicated Server App ID. Do not change.

Config.Name: Proton App ID
Config.Description: SotF Game Client App ID for Wine prefix. Do not change.

Config.Name: Game Port (UDP)
Config.Description: Game Port

Config.Name: Query Port (UDP)
Config.Description: Steam Query Port

Config.Name: BlobSync Port (UDP)
Config.Description: BlobSync Port
